name: go2-rc
description: Remote-control the Unitree Go2 EDU: a 3-service app group (motion API + camera stream + teleop web UI) that lets you drive the dog and watch its camera from a browser.

variables.name: RC_PORT
variables.description: Port for the teleop web UI — open http://<device>:<port> in a browser to drive the dog

variables.name: GO2_IP
variables.description: Go2 main-controller IP — the WebRTC camera source

variables.name: NETWORK_INTERFACE
variables.description: NIC on the deploy host that has the 192.168.123.0/24 address. On the Go2's onboard Jetson this is normally 'eth0'.
